steps.title: Use the two points
steps.content: The graph contains $(0,0)$ and $(1,8)$. Because the relationship is linear, those two points determine the whole function.

steps.title: Find the slope and equation
steps.content: The slope is $$\frac{8-0}{1-0}=8.$$ Since the line passes through $(0,0)$, the $y$-intercept is $0$, so $$h(x)=8x.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A — $h(x)=8x$. The other choices either add an intercept of $8$ or use the reciprocal slope, so they do not pass through both given points.
